source_pr.title: test: move loaddatatest into importintotest
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #42930

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
- move test in loaddatatest into importintotest ( ci part has merged https://github.com/PingCAP-QE/ci/pull/2157)

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature recorded in the case data; PR moves tests between folders and the captured signal is only BUILD race-mode metadata.
failure_signature: No concrete flaky signature recorded; test move/refactor with only BUILD race-mode metadata captured.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR moves `loaddatatest` into `importintotest` and updates BUILD/test layout. The case data only captures BUILD race-mode metadata and does not include a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization change. Keep it as insufficient evidence rather than asserting a confirmed data race.
fix_pattern: Test move/refactor (loaddatatest → importintotest) and BUILD updates; no clearly evidenced anti-flake stabilization in the case.
analysis:
PR title: test: move loaddatatest into importintotest
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/44617
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: + race = "on",
Changed files (15): Makefile, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/BUILD.bazel, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/detach_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/dummy_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/from_server_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/import_into_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/job_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/main_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/one_parquet_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/operate_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/precheck_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/show_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/test.parquet, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/util_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/loaddatatest/BUILD.bazel
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
